ocr_findings.description: 各通信規格の特徴 scatter chart (Wi-Fi/LTE/BLE/LPWA plotted by 消費電力 vs 通信距離) captured as image placeholder; axis labels and data point labels not extracted
学習のポイント box with mascot icon at bottom-right captured as image placeholder (img-1.jpeg); the LPWAの覚え方 section text is fully preserved in body text above

reviewer_notes: Page 484 of the source. IoTとネットワーク section covering BLE and LPWA definitions with comparison chart. All body text including BLE full name, LPWA full name, distance/power comparisons, and LPWAの覚え方 mnemonic faithfully reproduced.
